elements.name: Verify Manhattan login using different user roles

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into Manhattan application using "Admin" Credentials
user log out from application
user logs into Manhattan application using "Associate" Credentials
user log out from application
user logs into Manhattan application using "Supervisor" Credentials
user log out from application

elements.name: Verify ASN creation through Post MessageUI-excel
elements.description: Creating ASN through Post Message UI & verifying the response, checking status of the shipment

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into the Manhattan application
user create xml file with updated ASNNo & DeliveryStartDate for ReceivingASN
user update xml itemDetails from excel sheet
user opens post message screen and upload file in order to create ASN
user verify the response
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"
user log out from application

elements.name: Single Line receiving
elements.description: Creating ASN through Post Message UI, checking status of the shipment and completed receiving in Staging location through RF Menu

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into the Manhattan application
user create xml file with updated ASNNo & DeliveryStartDate for ReceivingASN
user update xml itemDetails from excel sheet
user opens post message screen and upload file in order to create ASN
user verify the response
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"
user views ASN, get and verify item details
user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "MM3 Recv-CASE" menu
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "40 - Receiving Verified"
user log out from application

elements.name: B-345747 MANH - Receive and bypass stage or holding
elements.description: Creating ASN through Post Message UI and complete receiving bypasing through staging location & validating LPN in Inventory by location

Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into Manhattan application using "Associate" Credentials
user create xml file with updated ASNNo & DeliveryStartDate for ReceivingASN
user update xml itemDetails from excel sheet
user opens post message screen and upload file in order to create ASN
user verify the response
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"
user views ASN, get and verify item details

user opens Inventory by location screen and validates the LPN created
user log out from application

elements.name: B-467729 – Configure Manhattan for RF lock-unlock iLPN-- Lock an iLPN using the user provided lock code
elements.description: Create an iLPN using RF MM3 Create iLPN option and apply the lock code provided by user

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into Manhattan application using "Associate" Credentials
user opens RF menu and go to invenorty & perform "RF MM3 Create iLPN" operation
user open iLPN and applies the lock code
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
validates the PIX Transactions "300,606" for this operation
user log out from application

elements.name: B-427075 FXL-FFD-CIL-MH_I Inventory Adjustments- Increase iLPN qty having no lock code before ASN verification
elements.description:
Creating ASN through Post Message UI and complete receiving bypasing through staging location & modify the 
iLPN by increasing the quantity & verify the iLPN, ASN and PIX transaction

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into Manhattan application using "Associate" Credentials
user create xml file using "Single Line ASN" with updated ASNNo & DeliveryStartDate for ReceivingASN
user update xml itemDetails from excel sheet
user opens post message screen and upload file in order to create ASN
user verify the response
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"
user views ASN, get and verify item details
user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "MM3 Rec-CASE-Ptwy" menu

user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the modification "Increase Qty" in iLPN
user views ASN, and validate ASN details
validates the PIX Transactions "300" for modifying iLPN
user log out from application

elements.name: B- 466712 Putaway – Un-Delivered Products that was received in MM3 returns
elements.description:
Receiving of Un-Delivered Product using MM3 returns menu and complete putaway to inspection area Validate the 
iLPN moved to inspection area and	“QC111A1” Locations Current Quantity will be incremented with no of LPN’s moved to location

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into Manhattan application using "Supervisor" Credentials
user create xml file using "Single Line Return ASN" with updated ASNNo & DeliveryStartDate for ReceivingASN
user update xml itemDetails from excel sheet
user opens post message screen and upload file in order to create ASN
user verify the response
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"
user views ASN, get and verify item details
user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "MM3 Returns" menu
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "40 - Receiving Verified"
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
user open reserve locations & naviagtes to "QC111A1" zone and fetches the current quantity
user opens RF menu and completes Putaway using "MM3 Ptwy-Sys Dir" menu
user navigates to reserve locations & validates that the quantity is increased in "QC111A1" by no of iLPN's moved
validates that the iLPN is also moved to inspection zone "QC111A1"
user log out from application
